subject: docs: add server-side requirements for backend integration
body:
Complete spec of what the Vercel backend needs to implement:
- Supabase schema (forms + form_submissions tables, RLS policies, indexes)
- 7 API endpoints with request/response shapes matching frontend types
- Server-side validation requirements for public form submissions
- Environment variables for both frontend and backend
- Data flow diagram showing which page calls which endpoint
- Future endpoints needed when Create/Save/Publish buttons are wired

Tags: documentation, backend, api, supabase
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch
